pyqgis_plugin.name: FiberNetworkAutomation
pyqgis_plugin.description: Automated FTTH fiber network design — Vuma (GPON aerial) and Fibre Time projects.
pyqgis_plugin.about:
Automates the full FTTH network planning workflow: Vuma: layer setup → cadastral fetch (CSG) → Overture building footprints → demand points → PON zones → cable routing → naming → QA Fibre Time (MOA): pole labelling → cable classification → enclosures → PON zones → feeder order → pole thickness → road crossing update
First run installs geopandas + overturemaps automatically (requires internet, ~2 min).
